Bayern: Juve close to Costa

Bayern Munich have confirmed that an agreement for Juventus to sign Douglas Costa “could be found soon”.

Links between Costa and Juve intensified last week, and Bayern CEO Karl-Heinz Rummenigge revealed he was “optimistic” about a deal being struck, which would take the Brazilian to Turin.

“There’s still no agreement, but talks are progressing and we could reach a final agreement soon,” he said at Corentin Tolisso’s presentation as a Roten player, reports Calciomercato.com.

The Bianconeri are reportedly hoping to negotiate a loan for the winger, which includes an compulsory purchase option for €40m next summer.

Juventus fly out for Costa
By Football Italia staff

Juventus general manager Giuseppe Marotta is expected in Germany today to close a deal for Bayern Munich winger Douglas Costa.

It was revealed last night that a deal had been agreed between the two clubs, a €6m loan with a €40m obligation to buy next summer.

Gazzetta dello Sport reports that Costa will be given a salary of €7m per season with only the final details of the transfer to be worked out today.

There is still no agreement over the timing of the payments, but Juve will be allowed to spread the €40m over several years.

Marotta is expected to arrive in Germany later today, and Costa could make his way to Turin as soon as this evening.

However, it’s more likely that he’ll come to Italy tomorrow to take his medicals and sign his contract.

By Football Italia staff

Douglas Costa has touched down in Turin, accompanied by Juventus director Beppe Marotta, to complete his transfer from Bayern Munich.

He arrived this evening and was greeted at the Caselle airport by the official Juventus social media team, who livestreamed his entrance.

The Brazilian turns 27 in September and will undergo a medical at the J Medical centre tomorrow morning.

His move is believed to be a two-year loan for €6m with option to buy for another €40m, which would become mandatory if he reaches certain sporting targets.

Fiorentina are furious with Federico Bernardeschi for giving an unauthorised interview about Juventus and could fine him as a result.

Bernardeschi controversially suggested to Gazzetta dello Sport in its Wednesday edition that he could not say ‘no’ to Juventus, from his holiday in Ibiza.

Consequently, a Press officer for the Viola has told Italpress that the club did not sanction the interview, leaving the winger at risk of a fine, as per his employer’s code of conduct.

Calciomercato.com adds the incident has created “huge tension” and that a meeting between Fiorentina sporting director Pantaleo Corvino and Bernardeschi’s agent Beppe Bozzo will take place this afternoon.

It also comes amidst claims that Juve are avoiding contact with Corvino and have already sent an offer to Bozzo for his client.

Official: Juventus sign Douglas Costa
By Football Italia staff

Juventus have officially signed Douglas Costa on a one-year loan from Bayern Munich with option to buy in 2018 for a total €46m.

A statement from the Turin giants confirmed the loan is worth €6m (to be paid within seven days) with €40m option, which becomes an obligation after certain sporting targets are met.

The €40m is payable over two years and there is a potential extra €1m paid to Bayern with the achievement of certain other targets.

“It was a serious and constructive negotiation process with the Juventus directors. All financial requirements of FC Bayern were fulfilled,” said Chairman Karl-Heinz Rummenigge.

“I would like to thank Douglas for his achievements. After two successful years with four titles, he wanted to begin a new challenge. We accepted this and wish him and his family all the best for the future in Italy.”

The 26-year-old Brazilian underwent his medical this morning and will wear shirt number 11 for Juventus.

意媒：米蘭已經報價邦路治

據意大利媒體《SportMediaset》報道，AC米蘭已經向祖雲達斯後衞邦路治進行了報價，而邦路治本人已經點頭同意。

作為祖雲達斯的主力後衞，邦路治近年來的發揮一直十分穩定。儘管如此，最近幾個月裏關於邦路治可能離開祖雲達斯的報道一直持續不斷。此前多家媒體都曾報道稱，巴塞、車路士等豪門球隊都希望能在今年夏天引進意大利後衞，而最近AC米蘭也加入到了其中。

據意大利媒體《SportMediaset》報道，邦路治已經接受了AC米蘭年薪700萬歐元的合同，而紅黑軍團也已經向祖雲達斯方面正式報價。

該媒體認為，AC米蘭方面將送出德希利奧，羅馬尼奧利，並將向尤文提供高額轉會費，而祖雲達斯將會在72小時之內做出決定。據透露，邦路治本人已經同意了米蘭方面的待遇。

不過也有媒體認為，祖雲達斯將邦路治出售給AC米蘭的可能性微乎其微。

《意大利體育》來自邦路斯經紀人的採訪宣稱，他們正在處理這位意大利國腳的轉會問題。
邦路斯轉投AC米蘭的傳聞表面上看起來幾乎並沒有可行性，不過包括意大利天空體育以及Mediaset Premium都做出了相關的報導，而按照《意大利體育》的說法，邦路斯的經紀人日前也表示，他們正在處理球員的轉會問題。
該報導相信，目前為止米蘭只是和邦路斯的經紀人Alessandro Lucci 進行協商，暫時還沒有和祖雲有過直接的接觸，不過這依然有可能會改變這位防線球星的未來。
《意大利體育》宣稱，Alessandro Lucci 已經告知米蘭，邦路斯願意考慮轉會的可能。
上賽季邦路斯曾和艾歷尼發生過衝突，同時他也被認為正在找尋新的挑戰，雖然曼城和車路士看起來是他更有可能加盟的球隊，不過他的家人卻不願意離開意大利。在這種情況下，邦路斯或許真的有轉投米蘭的可能。

邦路斯轉投AC米蘭的傳聞表面上看起來幾乎並沒有可行性，不過包括意大利天空體育以及Mediaset Premium都做出了相關的報導，而按照《意大利體育》的說法，邦路斯的經紀人日前也表示，他們正在處理球員的轉會問題。
該報導相信，目前為止米蘭只是和邦路斯的經紀人Alessandro Lucci 進行協商，暫時還沒有和祖雲有過直接的接觸，不過這依然有可能會改變這位防線球星的未來。
《意大利體育》宣稱，Alessandro Lucci 已經告知米蘭，邦路斯願意考慮轉會的可能。
上賽季邦路斯曾和艾歷尼發生過衝突，同時他也被認為正在找尋新的挑戰，雖然曼城和車路士看起來是他更有可能加盟的球隊，不過他的家人卻不願意離開意大利。在這種情況下，邦路斯或許真的有轉投米蘭的可能。
除了米蘭，今天出版的《都靈體育報》還將在頭版位置發布國米接觸邦路斯的消息。

Milan are offering €30m for Leonardo Bonucci, but Juventus want €45m, according to the latest reports.

Now Sky is reporting that there has been further contact with Bonucci’s agent, Alessandro Lucci, on the part of both clubs.

Lucci is acting as an intermediary in the deal, with the Diavolo offering €30m and Juve demanding at €45m.

Mattia De Sciglio could be included in the deal, which may lower the price, though its not clear if the Bianconeri’s figure includes the full-back.

唔講真係以為d記者係現場


郁手有咩可能誇尻張

祖記隊長保方在接受荷蘭足球報訪問中，炮轟烈治斯坦拿和邦路斯等人，稱他們就是祖記更衣室的毒瘤。 

保方談到：“如果你作為球隊隊長，你本應該感到高興因為這是一種榮譽，你可以帶領你的球隊不斷前進，你就是球隊領袖，但是我從來沒有享受過這樣的待遇，球隊有太多超級球星他們踢球都是以我為主，更衣室經常發生矛盾，開始我還試著去阻止，後來他們直接叫我閉嘴，我根本感覺不到自己就是隊長。” 

保方:“在球隊烈治斯坦拿常常痛罵一些年輕球員，這在正常不過了，不過也有球員被激怒的時候，記得在一場熱身賽中場休息的時候，烈治斯坦拿上半場踢得很不自在，回到更衣室用水瓶怒砸一位才進球隊的球員，當時很多隊友都已經無法容忍烈治斯坦拿的所作所為，在加上那些常被他欺辱的球員無法阻止一幕發生了，至少有10人群毆了烈治斯坦拿，你可以想像被10人群毆的滋味，在一旁的戴巴拿更是拍手叫好，不停大喊：“給我打，把他往死裡打，”當時邦路斯、馬治斯奧這兩位大佬並沒有參與這次毆鬥，他們也沒有阻止好像一切與他兩無關。” 

保方：“當發生那件事情后，烈治斯坦拿的更衣櫃多了一根鐵棍，我想他是用來防身吧，在2017年歐聯烈治斯坦拿正是用這根鐵棍報復了戴巴拿，在最後一場對陣皇馬比賽結束後，全隊回到更衣室，戴巴拿諷刺性說道：“意甲最佳後衛，明天我們就要回家了，”邦路斯臉色僵硬但並沒有回應什麼，只是默默的走出更衣室，這不像邦路斯的性格，果然在邦路斯再次回到更衣室的時候手裡握著一根木棍，在戴巴拿毫無防備的情況一棍打下，戴巴拿挨那一下著實不輕，趴在地上痛苦的抬頭才看到是打他那人正是邦路斯，不等戴巴拿起身，邦路斯又是一頓亂棍爆打，戴巴拿在地上滿地打滾不停求饒，在一旁的烈治斯坦拿可不會放過這樣的機會不斷說道：“邦路斯，打狗，用力打，往死裡給我打，打狗怎能少了我。 ” 

烈治斯坦拿的防身鐵棍終於派上了用場，可惜一棍下去戴巴拿就昏死了過去，打的興起的邦路斯怒了，朝著烈治斯坦拿吼道：“這下還還怎麼打，你該滾一邊去”烈治斯坦拿也不甘示弱：“你在說一遍，有種你重複一遍，”邦路斯沒有在回應烈治斯坦拿什麼，如果烈治斯坦拿手上沒有鐵棍那麼他們肯定會打起來。 

當時我身邊的隊醫嘴裡不停的說：“瘋了，瘋了，都已經瘋了。”

保方：“當發生那件事情后，烈治斯坦拿的更衣櫃多了一根鐵棍，我想他是用來防身吧，在2017年歐聯烈治斯坦拿正是用這根鐵棍報復了戴巴拿，在最後一場對陣皇馬比賽結束後，全隊回到更衣室，戴巴拿諷刺性說道：“意甲最佳後衛，明天我們就要回家了，”邦路斯臉色僵硬但並沒有回應什麼，只是默默的走出更衣室，這不像邦路斯的性格，果然在邦路斯再次回到更衣室的時候手裡握著一根木棍，在戴巴拿毫無防備的情況一棍打下，戴巴拿挨那一下著實不輕，趴在地上痛苦的抬頭才看到是打他那人正是邦路斯，不等戴巴拿起身，邦路斯又是一頓亂棍爆打，戴巴拿在地上滿地打滾不停求饒，在一旁的烈治斯坦拿可不會放過這樣的機會不斷說道：“邦路斯，打狗，用力打，往死裡給我打，打狗怎能少了我。 ” 

烈治斯坦拿的防身鐵棍終於派上了用場，可惜一棍下去戴巴拿就昏死了過去，打的興起的邦路斯怒了，朝著烈治斯坦拿吼道：“這下還還怎麼打，你該滾一邊去”烈治斯坦拿也不甘示弱：“你在說一遍，有種你重複一遍，”邦路斯沒有在回應烈治斯坦拿什麼，如果烈治斯坦拿手上沒有鐵棍那麼他們肯定會打起來。 

當時我身邊的隊醫嘴裡不停的說：“瘋了，瘋了，都已經瘋了。”

Nemanja Matic has been left out of the Chelsea pre-season tour squad, fuelling reports of an imminent transfer to Juventus.

The midfielder turns 29 next month and has been at Chelsea since January 2014 after a spell at Benfica.

While Manchester United and Inter are also tracking Matic, English sources including The Guardian and The Independent suggest Juve are the favourites.

Matic expressed his desire to move on from Stamford Bridge and has been training by himself this week.

Chelsea want £40m to push through the transfer (circa €45.6m).

"Even if I see it with my own eyes I won't believe that Bonucci is joining Milan. Maybe he goes abroad but Milan? No way, never"
- Simone Padoin

Leonardo Bonucci bought a full-page ad in La Gazzetta dello Sport to salute Juventus after his Milan transfer, but notably left out Max Allegri.

The defender made the move to San Siro on Friday for €42m and is finalising his medical tests today.

“Seven seasons have passed,” wrote Bonucci in an ad titled ‘A splendid story.’

“Seven seasons of victories, of dreams come true, of growth achieved via an empathic and exceptional bond with Juve, in its absolute entirety.

“Six Scudetti, all experienced and earned by fighting. Naturally, there remains the great regret of not winning the Champions League, but stronger than that is the pride of success achieved and of being part of a big Family.

“I always gave my all, truly, to the end. I received, I gave and I learned.

“What I see today looking behind me is in any case a splendid story, worthy of reaching its conclusion in full respect and affection, without sullying what I experienced together with the Club, the Captain, my teammates and fans.

“Thank you for everything, Juve.”

Notably, the list did not mention Coach Allegri, with whom Bonucci reportedly had numerous ugly clashes.

It is also worth noting that of the other Juventus players, only captain Gigi Buffon publicly saluted Bonucci on social media.

Giorgio Chiellini pointedly changed his avatar to a close-up of the Juve jersey.

係真咁無計啦 點解個更衣室會搞成咁


我估係唔想有一/兩個球員挾住成支球隊。
如果當日揀咗邦邦踢走咗屌帥，難保他朝有日新帥上任，有球員唔滿意，同樣事情只會繼續發生，亦都為其他球員立咗個壞榜樣。

再加上屌帥今季改用4-2-3-1陣式亦為球隊帶嚟唔小新衝擊同埋今季(除咗決賽)臨場調配陣式調動亦都唔錯，例如對巴塞果兩個回合咁。

新帥上任亦需時間磨合，短則一兩個月，長則成季都搞唔掂。

另外今次邦邦走應該令到年青一代球員上位(Rugani/Caldara,唔記得點串)。長江後浪推前浪，球員都會有老去嘅一日，離開亦係遲早嘅事，只不過係嚟早咗而已。個人相信管理層同老大球員們都有考慮到呢點先放人。

相信好多球迷感到唔高興嘅原因係因為邦邦既然係去大搞緊準備復興嘅宿敵。我個人相信邦邦其實唔係冇考慮過出國踢，只不過礙於家庭原因。每個人都有家庭，唔係每個都可以因爲球隊而放棄家庭。我諗邦邦心入面一定有個比重，未必係因為純粹同管理層不和而走人。

更衣室入面嘅事只有佢地自己知道，事情亦都過去。誰是誰非亦很難定奪，更何況我地呢啲普通球迷

祖雲從來都唔係打一人球隊，而係「一支團隊」。相信呢點由迪比亞路年代到今日從來都冇變。祖雲最感動人的往往是熱情同對團隊嘅執著。

人已走，唯有祝佢生活幸福美滿。與其沮喪倒不如勇往直前。

講得好好，內容想法絶對同意。
屌師呢三年証明咗自已，特別係近兩年。
干地的中前場班底走晒之後，屌師成功令球隊keep 住有競爭力。
三年三奪意甲、意杯，同兩次入歐聯決賽。
唔可以一場決賽失利，全盤否定晒主師的能力。
每支球隊都偶有發生球員同主師有爭執，每次都換主師咪好唔得閒？
如果球隊成績差都可以話換師求變。
但成績咁好都趕走主師，佢仲點控制球隊？

Juventus could ask Roma for unsettled defender Kostas Manolas after Leonardo Bonucci’s €42m move to Milan.

The departure of the Bianconeri icon has left a huge hole in the ‘BBC’ defence and there are several options to step in.

According to Tuttosport, the most intriguing idea is a swoop for Roma centre-back Manolas.

The Giallorossi had already agreed terms for a sale to Zenit St Petersburg, but the Greek international didn’t turn up to the medical, scuppering the transfer.

Manolas has been at Roma since the summer of 2014 and has also been linked with Chelsea, Arsenal, Liverpool, Paris Saint-Germain and Manchester United.

Mandzukic: 'Bonucci-Dani Alves brawl'
By Football Italia staff

Extraordinary details are emerging about Leonardo Bonucci and Dani Alves in a locker room brawl during the Champions League Final, confirmed by Mario Mandzukic.

There were already reports of a row at half-time in Cardiff between Bonucci and Paulo Dybala, denied by everyone involved, but it now seems as if the only incorrect detail was the protagonist and the timing.

It occurred before the 4-1 defeat to Real Madrid and involved Dani Alves instead of Dybala.

“I want to intervene to silence the rumours of an ugly atmosphere inside the Juve locker room,” Mandzukic was quoted as telling Serbian reporter Darko Meznovic.

“It was simply Bonucci and Dani Alves to have created this chaos and, fortunately, with their sales everything will become calm again.

“They were the ones who had a row during the Final and it’s simply because they have diametrically opposed personalities. Leo and Dani would argue all the time and, on the day of the Final, we simply watched another of their many dramas.

“As soon as we got into the locker room, everyone had treated this like a normal game with just three points up for grabs, or at least that’s how it seemed. So we expected Dani Alves to do his usual routine of putting on the Radio Party Groove music in the locker room while we were getting changed.

“This time, though, he didn’t stop there. He went over the top, playing Samba Do Janeiro at full volume as if he wanted to break our eardrums and then started dancing like there was no tomorrow.

“I thought he was being stupid, but ignored him and went to my locker. Leo didn’t, as for him the Champions League was an obsession.

“He went up to Dani and said he’d break his legs in three seconds if he didn’t turn off that music. Obviously, a row erupted and it just kept going, until Dani Alves said that if he lost the Final, he’d still have three Champions League trophies in his locker, whereas Bonucci had none.

“At that point, everyone turned around scandalised. I’ve won the Champions League, but I’d never dare say something like that. We shouldn’t even have thought about the eventuality of defeat.

“Then Leo grabbed Dani by the throat and, as he was about to punch him, Max (Allegri) divided them and took a decision of a real leader: he said he didn’t care who started it, but at the end of the game they’d both get kicked out.

“It was the wisest decision ever made. Now, the group is calm and united again, without the annoying bragging of Leo and the usual Brazilian pain in the neck of Dani Alves, who would never let us just get changed and focus.”

This would explain why Bonucci was sold to Milan for just €42m and Dani Alves even had his contract terminated early by mutual consent.

It also makes clear why the only Juve player to publicly salute Bonucci was Gigi Buffon, while Dani Alves was also largely ignored after his move to PSG.

Tuttosport list the potential heirs, along with Daniele Rugani and Medhi Benatia already in the squad.

Lazio defender De Vrij has long been on the Juve radar, as well as that of Liverpool, and his current contract expires in June 2018.

Being only 25 and already proving himself in Serie A, De Vrij is therefore the preferred option.

只差細節，尤文接近簽下紫碧比

據《羅馬體育報》報道，意大利時間今天祖雲達斯會和費倫天拿進行會談，敲定意大利前鋒貝拿迪斯治轉會的最後細節。

昨天，祖雲達斯官方宣佈和森多利亞達成共識，捷克前鋒希克將不會加盟斑馬軍團。在引進拜仁邊鋒D.哥斯達之後，尤文將引援重點瞄準費倫天拿前鋒貝拿迪斯治。

此前據多家意大利媒體報道，尤文已經和紫百合初步達成協議，斑馬軍團將會支付4000萬歐元的轉會費，附帶額外獎金。

據《羅馬體育報》報道，祖雲達斯將在今天和費倫天拿再次進行會談，斑馬軍團希望儘快敲定所有細節，在球隊美國行之前完成此次轉會。

不過費倫天拿方面對貝拿迪斯治的獎金條款有着較高的要求，他們希望在4000萬歐元的轉會費之外再增加1000萬歐元的浮動獎金，而祖雲達斯方面目前不願意支付總計5000萬歐元的費用，雙方將在會談中就獎金數目進行最後談判。

此外，《羅馬體育報》表示，費倫天拿方面不會接受技術性補償，也就是説，此前部分媒體報道的尤文可能會將史杜拿路加入交易一事並不會存在。

上賽季貝拿迪斯治代表費倫天拿各項賽事出場42次，打進14球並送出5次助攻。

消息参考来源: 羅馬體育報

據《羅馬體育報》報導，意大利時間今天祖雲達斯會和費倫天拿進行會談，敲定意大利前鋒貝拿迪斯基轉會的最後細節。
昨天，祖雲達斯官方宣布和森多利亞達成共識，捷克前鋒希克將不會加盟斑馬軍團。在引進翼鋒杜格拉斯-哥斯達之後，祖雲將引援重點瞄準費倫天拿前鋒貝拿迪斯基。
此前據多家意大利媒體報導，祖雲已經和紫百合初步達成協議，斑馬軍團將會支付4000萬歐元的轉會費，附帶額外獎金。
據《羅馬體育報》報導，祖雲達斯將在今天和費倫天拿再次進行會談，斑馬軍團希望盡快敲定所有細節，在球隊美國行之前完成此次轉會。
不過費倫天拿方面對貝拿迪斯基的獎金條款有著較高的要求，他們希望在4000萬歐元的轉會費之外再增加1000萬歐元的浮動獎金，而祖雲達斯方面目前不願意支付總計5000萬歐元的費用，雙方將在會談中就獎金數目進行最後談判。
此外，《羅馬體育報》表示，費倫天拿方面不會接受技術性補償，也就是說，此前部分媒體報導的祖雲可能會將史度拿路加入交易一事並不會存在。
